headline: What comes next? Three attack scenarios as U.S. sends thousands more troops to Middle East
summary: One of Iran's top lawmakers has said that they were anticipating a potential ground invasion of one its islands.

headline: Trump wants to squeeze Iran into peace talks with more troops — but it may backfire, analysts say
summary: Trump's threats to ramp up military presence may be to pressure Iran to negotiate but the battle may be harder than he calculated, say analysts.

raw.headline: Trump wants to squeeze Iran into peace talks with more troops — but it may backfire, analysts say
